title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Bank of India Holdings Services - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Bank of India Holdings Services - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Bank of India Holdings Services invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Risk Analyst at our Mysuru location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Bank of India Holdings Services:
Bank of India Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bank of India Holdings Services!
